summary:
PRAYER AND WEATHER EVENTS: Brandon discusses the power of corporate prayer, noting that intercessory efforts for the United States and the president have shifted national trajectories. He references scripture, specifically Proverbs 15 and James 5, to emphasize the impact of fervent prayer. Brandon states that recent intercession mitigated the severity of a major winter storm, reducing anticipated damage, snow accumulation, and power outages.

ECONOMIC PROPHECIES AND NORTH AMERICAN MERGER: Brandon shares visions regarding the economic future, stating that Canada and Mexico will undergo a financial merger with the United States, adopting a unified currency while maintaining physical borders. He mentions Mark Carney and a push for business with China. Brandon notes that this new currency system is designed to oppose BRICS and the dollar, ultimately leading toward a One World Order, the Mark of the Beast, and a one-world currency. He also recounts repeatedly praying over the Dinar that he saw in a vision alongside President Trump.

END TIMES TIMELINE AND GLOBAL CRISES: Brandon details his timeline for the end times, suggesting the Rapture of the Church will be the lynchpin causing a total societal meltdown. He predicts an economic crisis will precede a global plague, which he foresees occurring around the spring and fall of 2027 and into 2028. Famine and plague will accompany each other. Furthermore, Brandon points to global instability, predicting regime changes in Iran, Cuba, Mexico, and China, where military divisions over Taiwan will spark an uprising and a subsequent revival in the Chinese church.

MIDDLE EAST DEVELOPMENTS AND GAZA: Brandon describes visions of the Gaza Strip being transformed into a beautiful landscape resembling Miami, managed by Jared Kushner and ten leaders. He claims to have seen massive, untapped oil and gas reserves in the Mediterranean Sea just outside Gaza, representing billions of dollars that God strategically placed there for His people to utilize.

PRESIDENT TRUMP AND THE VALLEY OF DECISION: Brandon states that President Trump is currently in a critical valley of decision that will determine the trajectory of his presidency. He emphasizes the need to pray for godly counsel to surround the president and to remove reprobate voices, specifically concerning decisions about Greenland, Iran, Cuba, and Mexico. Brandon notes that demonic forces are attempting to cause confusion in the president's mind. Additionally, Brandon shares a vision of the Trump family's wealth doubling by 2026, specifically highlighting Eric Trump as a recipient of massive financial blessing.

DOMESTIC UNREST AND CORRUPTION EXPOSURE: Brandon foresees 2026 being marked by intense political theater, paid demonstrations, and rioting leading up to July. He describes deep-rooted corruption in California linked to Gavin Newsom, depicting a dark, molasses-like substance surrounding him. Brandon outlines cartel operations using California as a transportation highway for trafficking and money laundering, involving cash bribes to law enforcement. He also predicts the exposure of significant political corruption in Minnesota, Seattle, Portland, and San Francisco, specifically naming the Pelosi family and Kamala Harris. Furthermore, Brandon states that Chuck Schumer's days are numbered due to health issues and that a major shaking will clean out the Senate.

SEISMIC ACTIVITY AND NATURAL WARNINGS: Brandon claims that precursors to major geological events are already happening, specifically mentioning seismic activity deep in the ground off the coast of Oregon. He notes that fish washing up on shores will serve as a warning sign before a more catastrophic event occurs.

CHURCH SHAKING AND JUDGMENT: Brandon warns that a swift judgment is coming to the church in America, particularly in California and Texas. He states that severe financial and sexual corruption will be exposed among charismatic leaders and within the Catholic Church, including priests and cardinals. Brandon instructs his audience to refrain from gossiping about these fallen leaders and instead pray for their restoration, noting that the exposure will cause many new believers to backslide.

EUROPEAN TURMOIL AND MACRON AS A FORERUNNER: Brandon predicts a rise in anti-Semitism in Europe that will drive Jewish people back to Israel. He calls for the removal of Ukrainian President Zelensky, citing money laundering and child trafficking. Finally, Brandon identifies French President Emmanuel Macron as a forerunner to the Antichrist, associating him with Agenda 2030, the plague, the World Health Organization, and a global digital ID. Brandon states Macron is seeking alliances with a female leader in Italy and British royals to establish a New World Order, while simultaneously opposing Donald Trump's initiatives. Brandon also mentions engaging in spiritual warfare concerning the upcoming Olympics, citing purple colors and Illuminati globalist agendas.
rawData: [January 26, 2026]-[Come pray with us - praying for our President - day 1]-[https://youtu.be/-_dbVTpbFIs]-[Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again tonight. We're going to pray and sing a little bit. I'll sing some songs or whatever the Lord has on His heart for me to sing. I woke up this morning singing a song out of my sleep, so I figured this is what He wanted to hear. I told Diana, "You know, whenever it happens—it happens quite often—but this one, I haven't heard this song in so long and I couldn't believe it. I was like, 'Well, that's really cool.'" The last video was heavy, but I really feel in my spirit we've made great ground concerning praying for our president and praying for our nation. I could feel the shifting last night as we were interceding for our leader, and that makes me so happy. It felt so good to feel that. For those of you familiar with what I'm talking about—some of you are just babies at this, but some of you are veterans—when you get in that river of prayer, you can feel the wall or you can feel a flow. Sometimes you just keep hitting that wall, hitting that door until you have it open. In prayer, a lot of times when I'm interceding, you can feel when other people are pulling with you. You can feel, in a corporate setting, when other people are on the same assignment as you in the Spirit. So, whenever I'm praying over our president and I'm praying over this, it's almost like you're walking through mud, and you're pulling and trying so hard to gain ground. You're grabbing and clenching and pulling yourself up out of it, and then all of a sudden, you're on a slide. You could feel that last night as I was interceding. We had times of prayer here, and I want to tell you this: faith is not a feeling, and prayer is not a feeling. I'm not moved by what I see; I'm not moved by what I feel. I'm moved by what the Word of God says, so don't always go by a feeling. But whenever you get sensitive to the things of the Spirit, you will know what I'm talking about more. There is a river, then there's dry, and then it's like going through mud. You can feel your toil in the ground; it's pulling and pulling. Last night you could feel that there's so many people praying for President Trump and praying for this nation. I was excited about it. I believe the fervent prayer of the righteous availeth much—the fervent, effectual prayer. Honey, find the scripture; I don't want to misquote it. I was looking at Proverbs 15:8: "The prayer of the upright is His delight." I believe tonight, as we pray for our president and our nation, the prayer of the upright is His delight. Isn't that wonderful? I love that; He delights in it. James 5:16: "The effectual fervent prayer of a righteous man availeth much." The fervent, effectual prayer of the righteous availeth much. We're getting the job done. I really believe that's what God has called and assigned us to do for such a time as this. The effectual fervent prayer of a righteous man availeth much. And that's who we are. Braden's grinning at me; I get tongue-tied. All glory to Jesus. Isn't that wonderful? I believe that's what we're doing and we'll continue to do all throughout 2026 and the rest of this year, praying over what I believe the Lord has shown us through prayer. We're praying over these major events where I believe we have power and authority. As we prayed into the storm and took authority over it, there wasn't as much damage as they were thinking. We didn't have as much snow as we were expecting. Maybe some people got a lot, but our area, when we got out today, didn't seem way bad. Based on what we could see on the news, it could have been a lot worse, with many more power outages. I believe it's because the people were praying. As big as that storm was and as big as that event could have been, it could have been more catastrophic. So, we give all the glory to Jesus today. If you're without power, it's terrible, but I believe they'll get it on quickly. Let's pray that they get it on quickly tonight, that they'll have all the power up, and that you won't be without your electricity and heat. They'll be able to do a quick work and get to you fast. You'll have favor where everyone else doesn't. You'll have favor because you're a child of the King. I believe that God's favored you today and put goodness and mercy on you, and it's following you all the days of your life. I stand on that and we believe it. We're believing believers who are receivers, and we're contenders for the glory. We're contenders for the end-time anointing, the outpouring of finances, and whatever God has for us. We will lack no good thing. I believe that, so that's what we're going to stand on tonight. We see the things in the news from Carney, the Prime Minister of Canada. I thought it was interesting because of the prophetic words the Lord has given us and the visions we've seen about him going to China and saying, "Hey, I want to do business with you." This was his last major push, from what I saw in the Spirit, for his country to pull itself out of this hole. I saw Canada going into a depression and joining up with America in the days ahead—not saying Canada is dissolved, like I keep hearing President Trump saying '51st state' and all this, but a financial merger. Their currency became our currency; that's what I saw. We still had borders, but their currency and Mexico's currency became one. This is what I've been praying over for two years. I think some things the Lord shows us happen really quickly, like the storm coming. We saw that back on November 11th, and we've been praying over it. We saw it on October 29th, and then we saw it again—was it in July? He's been talking to us about this for seven months. He talked about October and November, too. So, we've had these cues to pray over the weather and this storm. I believe we prayed over it and saw results. When we see Canada and Mexico joining up with the United States to have a currency, it's when I saw them trying to come against the dollar and the BRICS in the days ahead to bring a stronger currency system. We keep praying into that. All I know is it's all leading up to the Mark of the Beast and the One World Order. What will be the lynchpin for the One World Order and the one-world currency? I believe truly—and this is just Braden and me thinking, I can't speak for Diana, though I know she agrees with everything—the Rapture of the Church could be the lynchpin. The total meltdown of society will happen when hundreds of millions, if not a billion, believers are taken out of here in the Rapture of the Church. Now, there are a lot of people who don't believe that, but I'm trying to say: what is the lynchpin that pushes this over? War, rumors of war, plague. The plague that I've seen coming in 2020, 2028, the spring and fall of 2027, going into 2028, is when I've seen a great shaking coming. Now, some people say that's too early, Brandon. I believe that it's further down the road. I believe we're going to see an economic crisis before we see the plague. This is what I saw when I was praying: the financial and economic situation and the plague go hand in hand. They ride together. They're like twins. Famine and plague ride together. And so, you know, that's just me looking into it. I don't want to add to or take away from anything. It's just me trying to figure it out with my natural mind and say, "Listen, Lord, how close are you to your coming? How close are we?" There are a lot of people who believe He could come back in the next five minutes. I believe no man knows the day or the hour; that's what the Bible says. But we can see the signs of the times looking all around us. We see Iran and all the uprisings and the regime change that I believe is about to happen in Cuba, Mexico, and so on, as part of this end-time move. Here we see some people are saying, "Is this the ten kings rising up in Gaza with the president and Jared Kushner running this, and the new Gaza Strip and all the beauty of the buildings that they're promising?" And they have oil derricks, and they put that off to the side, a little bit over here. I thought that was interesting. The beautiful landscape I told you looked like Miami; that's what I saw in the spirit. And the Lord said, "But I saw oil, oil, oil and gas, gas, gas." I said there was so much money, billions of dollars in the Mediterranean, outside of Gaza. I saw so much money down in there. It was a pocket of oil that was one of the largest reserves in the world. And the Lord said, "I put that there strategically for my people. It's been there and they're about to tap into it." Well, maybe they've tapped into a little bit of it, but I believe that God is able to replenish and bring it in. It could not have been there and all of a sudden, He's like, "You know what?" And the oil goes, and you go, "How in the world?" It's only God. That's why I believe we're so close. We're about to see something major. As we pray, keep praying into 2026 as this valley of decision where President Trump is at right now. Just like the Lord told us back at the first of January, He said he's going to go through the valley of decision. His decisions are going to fork off, and he'll either go this way or he'll go that way. But it's up to the church to pray him through this so that he makes the right decisions. The Bible says, "Choose life." Life and death are in the power of... choose life. I don't know if I'm quoting that scripture right again, but He's talking about choosing life. It's your choice. Choose the direction of what I want you to have. Choose life. It's a choice. So we pray for President Trump to make the right choice. It's so important. You don't realize how much authority you have as a believing believer. That's the problem. A lot of the church doesn't realize that when Christ sat down, we sat down with Him. As He is, so are we in this world. Ephesians is alive, and it's alive in me. The more you read it, the more it's going to renew your mind, and the more you're going to get the Word inside of you and it will change you from the inside out. When you become God-inspired, God-thinking—as He is, so are we in this world—you have to be a believing believer who receives it by reading this Bible and getting it down in your heart. Faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the Word of God. The only way you're going to change, ladies and gentlemen, is by getting this Word down inside of your heart. You can read it and just glance over it, but it's when you meditate on it, when you get it down inside of you, that the entrance of the Word brings forth light. The Word will change you and bring forth light. That's what I'm trying to tell you all tonight. You must get this Word down inside of you for just what we read: the fervent, effectual prayer. What does it mean to be fervent? To be fervent means to probably be like a bulldog on a bone—one who is passionate about prayer. We probably could look up the definition of it, Diana, but I just visualize what the Lord is saying. The fervent, effectual prayer of the righteous. When you are just dogmatic—I am going to get it, we're going to believe God—having displayed a passion of intensity. Thank you, Braden and Diana, my two helpers. "Having or displaying a passionate intensity." So, just being intense. That's what we are; we're intense. I want to be all in for Jesus, being sold out. I want to be filled with and controlled by the Holy Spirit so that when people see me, they say, "He's intense." I like that. He's intense; he's passionate. He's not just somebody who says, "Oh well, whatever will be, will be." I believe that we're the people who say, "No, we can change things through faith. We can speak to our mountain, 'Be thou removed, be thou cast into the sea,' and we shall not doubt in our hearts. We shall have whatsoever things we say." Mark 11:24, we're going to speak to the mountain. This is the mountain of where we are right now. We have President Trump and he has counsel. We need to pray for godly counsel around him to make godly decisions concerning Greenland, Iran, Cuba, Mexico—all these things where he could put his influence, being from the strongest nation in the world, being able to influence and bring forth the end-time harvest. Where could we, as believing believers, help influence by praying over him to have good, godly counsel? Not having evil people speaking into his life who say, "Well, we want to go this way," when it's not the plan of the Lord. The plan of the Lord is to bring all that is lost to be saved. He wills that no one should perish, but all come to repentance. But everybody has to have ears to hear, plus they have to have a way to hear it. If you have a dictator over an area and they say, "Well, we don't want the Bible coming in here; we don't want Christianity being preached." The Bible says when this Word is preached as a witness throughout the whole world, then the end will come. So is that a restrainer—whenever you can't hear the Word? Yes. So what do we do with the restrainer trying to prevent bringing the Word into the nation? We remove it by faith, by prayer, by fasting, and by coming into agreement through corporate prayer, saying, "No, we will have a revival in Cuba. We will have a revival in Brazil, in Iran, and North Korea." Those people are being oppressed. They're suppressed and they can't get out; they have an iron curtain there. But when we are believing believers who come into agreement, we can move that out of the way. That's why we're here. I just want you to get excited about prayer. Be that definition—passionate intensity. It's time; we've got to do it. That's what we're here for today. I like that. The prayer of the upright is his delight. So we have prayers and we are upright. We are the righteousness of God in Christ Jesus. Every single one of us here, we take it by faith. We're wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. He dwells on the inside of us and we take this communion and all the things that we see on the news. Like I said a thousand times, if you're praying the news, you're too late. We see the news before the news happens. We can turn this thing before the news manifests. Terrorist attacks, the Red Dawn experience, volcanoes. People say, 'Where's the volcano, Brandon? How come we haven't seen a volcano?' I want to be real with you. From what I saw, we see the beginning stages of something shaking in the ground outside of Oregon's coast. Those are warning signs. It's 6.0. The ground is shaking in the deep just like the Lord said it would in the exact spot the Lord told us it would. But you say, 'Well, how come it hasn't happened and nobody's died?' Because we have prayers out there. I believe that's a prayer foil if we start seeing this stuff happen to the capacity against our believing brothers and sisters. I believe a thousand shall fall at your side, 10,000 at your right hand, folks. But we know we're in the end times. We're going to see some things. We can't stop it all. But those are the signs I'm trying to tell you. It's in the ground. It's happening right there. How much more do you need to see other than a catastrophic event killing a whole bunch of people? And we don't want that. It's in the ground. It's in the water. It's signs. And the Lord said, 'Watch the fish coming up out of the water and coming up on the shores.' And this will be a sign that it's about ready to happen. We're already seeing precursors of it. Major earthquakes, major shakings, major awakenings, wars, and rumors of wars. We are in the last days. But I think it's interesting, like a frog in a pot, the water is getting hotter and hotter and hotter, and people around it get so accustomed to what they're seeing all the time. But if you go back 20 years ago to the early 2000s and you were to go and look ahead, you would go, 'Oh my gosh, this is definitely the end times.' If you were able to watch a movie and it was panned out before you, the pandemic that happened in 2020 and you have all of these major signs that are happening, you would automatically say we are in the last days in 2020. If you were in 2020 and you were looking at it and then now you look now, or in 2000 when we went through 9/11 and all the things, we thought that was it. Most of the people I remember as a young man, even in 1999, we thought Jesus is coming back way before 2000, but we're still here and we occupy until he comes. So we're going to keep praying and like I said, I just keep looking up, for I know our redemption is drawing nigh, folks. But I know that he said, 'I want a harvest of souls, Brandon. I don't want that any should perish. I want one more push. I will delay this for one more push. I want one more harvest for my people to come to me. I'm going after—I'm leaving the 99 to go after the one in the back field.' So I thought, okay, I know there's a great falling away. We can see it. But there's certain people that I know: there's grandmas on here right now, there's grandpas, there's mamas, there's daddies, there's aunts—you're believing for them, and you're calling out for the Lord to bring them in, and you're saying, 'I will have my unsaved relatives, or my boss, or my coworker, or whatever.' You're believing God for that unsaved loved one. And you're saying, 'Father, when is their time? When is their time?' Some plant, some water, and some bring forth the increase. But I believe, Father, that you'll bring forth the increase, that they will not go to hell. They will not die and go to hell, and that you have a plan for their life. You cry out for them every night. And I believe those effectual fervent prayers of the righteous are going to avail much. So let's take our communion. He didn't have a lot of news today, did he? It looks like this right here. They send underground chatter. They have like this app and then they're talking about ICE and like—I don't know, is that the rioting and all that? Yeah. That's the political theater and the political drama that I've seen coming. And the Lord said 2026 will be marked as political theater—a lot of drama and a lot of protesting and uprising going clear into July. There'll be major shakes in this going into the 250 years. So it's happening. So what do we do about it? We pray a diffusing of rioting. We pray a diffusing of uprising and people acting out. Paid demonstrators by George Soros paying the demonstrators, people that are very corrupt and evil. And we pray for President Trump to have that backbone like a crowbar led by the spirit of God. You say, 'Well, he has to be surrendered.' You don't know where he's at with the Lord. How would you act if the pressure of the world, the pressure of all these nations, the pressure of the responsibility, knowing that you're one of the main closers to lead this thing into the end of the end, that you have strategic assignments from the Lord for you, and you've got all this stuff that's on you as a man of almost 80-some years old? This is a lot. You can already see this. He has confusion. He's saying Iceland instead of Greenland. He's saying all these things. His mind—that devil poking at his head so he can't think clear to get the job done. Then you got bozos in his cabinet speaking things that are evil and they have a reprobate mind. And the Bible says take no counsel from the ungodly. So you've got the reprobate-minded people speaking to him. So that's why you've got to put good godly prayer counsel around him to pray, so it's important. And then we see his sons and the Lord said we've got to pray for his sons. I saw even yesterday when I was praying, I saw again in 2026 a doubling of their wealth. A great fountain of physical wealth is coming to the Trumps. I saw mega money, you know, and most people say, 'Well, Brandon, this is what I saw.' But I saw it on Eric. I keep seeing Eric's face before me. And the Lord said, 'I'm going to bless that man. And there will be a doubling, and there's going to be so much extra wealth, money coming on them.' So I thought in my lightning-fast mind, I'm thinking if it's on him, what's he doing to get it? If I can be a shadow and learn, teach me. I want to learn. So if I can just do it through social media and try to follow what they're doing, I want to learn. But this is all in my opinion of what the Lord has told me. And it's not financial advice. I'm not a financial adviser. I have to always say that. But I believe I'm personally right to believe it, that you can watch them and I believe the blessing's on them. You say, 'Well, I don't believe it.' Well, then that is on you. But I'm not telling you to follow it and to do what they do. That's just what I'm doing. I'm just watching. I'm just thinking, 'Hm,' because this is what I keep seeing in visions to pray over these men. So you say, 'Well, I don't believe it.' That's on you then. I don't care. I'm not telling you to do it. It's my opinion. And praying over the pink currency. Praying over this. I keep seeing the pink currency when I'm praying. I heard it again last night. In fact, I was looking to think something happened last night about the pink currency and people sent me pictures with President Trump sitting with his MAGA hat on. He was sitting behind a desk and he had a currency note and some others and it looked like that currency that I've been praying over. And I said, "Well, I'll be, you know, why was that there?" And some man was talking to him and I thought, "That's kind of interesting." But I just keep praying over the pink currency. You say, "What's the pink currency?" I'm not a financial advisor. You pray about what pink currency is. So, you know, I believe with all my heart that we're on the right path, going the right direction, and we're going to keep going the right direction because the Holy Spirit is leading us, and he is telling us what to do. And as for me in my house, we're going to serve the Lord, and we're going to do the best we can. You may kind of stumble a little bit along the way, but I'm going to get back up, brush my knees off, and keep running unto him. And Father, I thank you, Lord, that you have patience for me. He's had patience in the past. It seemed like, man, I can't believe he's even put up with me anymore. He's up there saying, "Brandon, you got what it takes. Come on, keep going. You got this." And so if he's saying that to me, he's saying that to you. I'm nothing special. I'm just a kid that said, "Okay, I'll do it." Same with you. If you just be willing and obedient, you'll eat the good of the land. That's what he said. Be willing and obedient. What are you willing to do? Whatever he asks you to do, and then you're obedient to what he asks you to do. And you sow where he tells you to sow and you give to where he tells you to give. Good measure, pressed down, shaken together, will be running over that men give unto your bosom. But if you give a thimbleful, you'll reap back thimblefuls. If you give an overflow, a bountiful amount, you'll get back dump truck fools. With the measure that you give, you'll get back. There's scripture. Where is that? Do you know what I'm talking about? So many people don't. It's trying. It's putting forth the effort in the natural and applying it with the spirit. I heard Brother Hagin say, "For with the same measure that you meet withal, it shall be measured to you again." Luke 6:38. It says it better in my mind. I've heard a better translation, I think. But that's sufficient. They can look it up on their own. King James says, "Give and it shall be given you; good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over will be put in your bosom. For with the same measure that you use, it will be measured back to you." Yep. So if you give a thimble, you'll reap back thimbles. If you give a dump truck, you'll reap back dump trucks in simple terms. And that's Luke 6:38. Father, we just thank you, Lord, for your body that was broken for us. We're so thankful, Father, for all that you've done for us. We receive it by faith that we're wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. And like what we were hearing Brother Hagin preach today, he was talking about having the healing of your body, and the deliverance of what you need starts from your spirit outward. Renew your mind to the word of God. And Father, I thank you for people like Brother Hagin, that his teachings and what he taught, the word of God is still on this earth and we got it on YouTube. And I'm so thankful that those tapes, those cassettes, those things that we had didn't just go away. That somebody took the time to upload them, that we could listen to Brother Hagin even after his passing of over 20 years. I'm so thankful, Father. We're so thankful. We don't exalt a man, but we love the word of God, Father. And we thank you for those that teach it. We're so grateful, Father, for people that bring forth the good news. We're so grateful, Father, that you've chosen us to pray. And Father, we will pray with the people tonight. And we're so grateful, Father, for this time of prayer uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. Father, I thank you that you speak through my vocal cords and think through my mind. Lord, none of me and all of you. We take this body in the name of Jesus and we're healed and whole and well by your stripes. And we thank you, Lord, Father, that we're redeemed from the curse of the law. Galatians says that Christ has redeemed me from the curse of the law. And we're healed and whole and well in the mighty name of Jesus. And we take this body and that's from colds to viruses to all of it. And we receive it by faith. We're not moved by what we see. We're not moved by what we feel. We're moved by what the word of God says. Thank you for the blood. Lord, we take the blood and we make much of the blood and the blood makes much of us. I thank you for the blood. We thank you, Lord. We apply the blood. And we thank you, Lord, that you said if we confess our sins, you are faithful and just to forgive us of our sins and cleanse us of all unrighteousness. And right now in the name of Jesus, Father, we confess all the things we've done wrong. And we thank you, Lord, that it's washed in your precious blood. Thank you, Lord, that you've forgiven us once and for all. It's done. And Father, we thank you, Lord. We come up underneath that mighty hand and we sit at your feet. And we thank you, Lord, that whatever's on your heart tonight, whatever's on your heart tonight, Lord, we pray it out and we give you all the glory. We give you all the honor and we give you all the praise for where we are in these end times, Father, that we're the closers and you chose us for such a time as this. And Father, I'm thankful that we are the generation that will not taste death, that we will see the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ in our lifetime and we will be those closers that tell the good news throughout the whole world, telling the people that Jesus Christ is Lord and he's coming back and he has a plan for their life and that healing belongs to them, deliverance belongs to them and Father that you have made a way for them to live an abundant life. And I thank you, Lord, that we are the kids that believe it. We're your children. We believe it. And Father, we thank you, Lord, for tonight's prayer. And if there's anything you would want to show me, if not, we'll just pray. But Lord, we yield to the prophetic. We yield to the anointing. I yield to the anointing of the prophetic. And Father, if there's anything you want to show me, Father, I thank you, Lord, that you show us that which is to come.
